assertions.text: Attacks the strongest claims first (decision compression, demo-as-spec), not peripheral weaknesses
Provides the strongest version of the opposing view — not a straw man but a real argument someone would make
Challenges survivorship bias — only two projects, both presented as successes
Questions whether outcomes should be attributed to Claude Code or to the author's effort/context
Classifies each challenge as fatal flaw, weakness to acknowledge, or valid tradeoff
Ends with 'The lesson survives if...' conditions
